channel.title: ubuntu on Louis LIN's blog
channel.description: Recent content in ubuntu on Louis LIN's blog

item.title: Ubuntu custom desktop shortcuts
item.description:
With Ubuntu, you can create your own desktop shortcuts that will be accessible directly from the launcher.

You can do it by using a GUI, or you can do it using directly a terminal, which is the what we will be covering here.

item.title: Using host DNS in Docker container with Ubuntu 18
item.description: Docker containers running in Ubuntu 18 can't resolve DNS as they are trying to use the default Google DNS server 8.8.8.8 as their DNS server.
